use_cases: Hero section headlines with interactive letter animations that scale on hover
Navigation links with cascading letter effects for enhanced interactivity
Button text or call-to-action labels with engaging hover feedback
Logo or brand name displays with 3D letter transformation effects
Interactive typography components for creative landing pages
ai_summary: A 3D letter hover effect component that creates cascading scale animations across individual text characters. When hovering over text, the target letter scales dramatically with perspective transforms while adjacent letters scale proportionally less, accompanied by brightness and shadow adjustments for a premium interactive feel.
